author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for four remaining TUI overlays (ModelPicker, ModePicker, NotificationBar, AskUserQuestion dialog) — overlay plumbing already shipped in b9e13aa (trait + ActiveOverlay enum + centered_rect + HelpOverlay + LogSelector). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: each component is a single-file addition under src/tui/components/ but they require model/provider list wiring, behavioral-mode introspection, ask_user_question marker interception, and rate-limit/permission notification routing — design work crossing #253 (App decomposition) and #510 (SessionState). Feature-implementation tickets, owner-level.
